bird: The bird flies in a straight line from left to right and then stopped, hovering in the air.
run: The man started running from left to right and stopped at the finish line.
boat: A small boat drifts quickly from the left bank of the river to the right bank, finally stopping on the right bank.
boy: The character wearing a jetpack flies straight from the left side of the screen to the right, then stops and hovers.
car: A car starts from the left side of the screen, drives to the right, and finally stops at the end of the road.
frog: The frog hops from the stone platform on the left to the lotus leaf on the right, then stops moving.
rabbit: A rabbit runs from the left side of the picture to the right side and stops in front of the carrot.
train: A train departs from the station on the left and stops at the terminal station on the right.
softball: The softball player throws the ball from the left side of the screen to the right side, and the ball lands on the ground.
bird_mirrored: The bird flies in a straight line from right to left and then stopped, hovering in the air.
run_mirrored: The man started running from right to left and stopped at the finish line.
boat_mirrored: A small boat drifts quickly from the right bank of the river to the left bank, finally stopping on the left bank.
boy_mirrored: The character wearing a jetpack flies straight from the right side of the screen to the left, then stops and hovers.
car_mirrored: A car starts from the right side of the screen, drives to the left, and finally stops at the end of the road.
frog_mirrored: The frog hops from the stone platform on the right to the lotus leaf on the left, then stops moving.
rabbit_mirrored: A rabbit runs from the right side of the picture to the left side and stops in front of the carrot.
train_mirrored: A train departs from the station on the right and stops at the terminal station on the left.
softball_mirrored: The softball player throws the ball from the right side of the screen to the left side, and the ball lands on the ground.
